name: web-scraping-report
description: Extract useful information from one or more web pages and turn it into a clean report.
instructions: Open the target URLs or search for relevant pages if no URL is provided. Extract page title, main claims, tables, links, dates, and source details. Filter boilerplate. Return a report with key findings, quoted data points when available, source links, and any caveats.

examples.input: Scrape pricing pages for three CRM tools
examples.output: A structured pricing comparison with source URLs.

author: Neura
